reviews.review_description:
Minesweeper Demo takes the classic puzzle formula and places you inside a VR environment. Instead of simply clicking tiles on a flat screen, you physically interact with the board, making the experience feel more immersive and surprisingly tense. The demo keeps the core gameplay recognizable: uncover tiles, avoid hidden mines, and use logic to solve the board.

Visually, the game is simple but clean, which works well for a puzzle-focused VR title. The controls are easy to understand, making it accessible even for players who are still new to VR gaming. The atmosphere is calm but can quickly become stressful once the board starts filling with dangerous guesses. 

Reaching out to reveal tiles gives a satisfying sense of involvement that traditional Minesweeper never had.

The demo can be played infinity. You just reset the board.  And 4 difficulty levels.
